title: #AIS: Opening chat with Miami Mayor Francis Suarez
description:
This talk was recorded LIVE at the All-In Summit in Miami and included slides. To watch on YouTube, check out our All-In Summit playlist: https://bit.ly/aisytplaylist

0:00 Yung Spielburg intros the Besties + Besties give reactions to the All-In Summit

5:56 Miami Mayor Francis Suarez joins the Besties on stage to chat: Miami's emergence as a tech hub, his governing principles, crypto, what the future holds & more

Follow Mayor Suarez:

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast features a live chat with Miami Mayor Francis Suarez at the All-In Summit, discussing Miami's emergence as a tech hub, governing principles, and the future of crypto. The conversation covers various topics, including the city's growth and development. The episode also includes reactions from the Besties to the All-In Summit.

takeaways.text: Miami is becoming a tech hub
Mayor Suarez has a strong vision for the city
Crypto is a key part of Miami's future
The city is focused on innovation and growth
The Besties react to the All-In Summit
Miami's governing principles are centered around progress
The future of tech is being shaped in Miami
The city is open to new ideas and technologies

sentiment.notes: The conversation is positive and focused on the future of Miami as a tech hub, with a strong sense of excitement and possibility.

notable_moments.description: Miami Mayor Francis Suarez joins the Besties on stage
